questions.question: What is the purpose of a personal digital wellness assessment?

options.text: To reflect on your current technology habits, identify what's working and what's not, and clarify your values and goals
To calculate your total screen time

questions.explanation: A personal digital wellness assessment is a self-reflection tool to examine your current habits, identify patterns that support or undermine your wellbeing, and clarify what changes align with your values and goals.

questions.question: Which question is most important to ask during a digital wellness assessment?

options.text: How many hours per day do I use screens?
Does my technology use align with my values? Does it support or interfere with what matters most to me?
Do I use more technology than my friends?
Which apps are most popular right now?

questions.explanation: The most important question is values alignment: Does your technology use support what matters to you (relationships, health, growth, rest)? Hours matter less than whether your use serves or undermines your priorities.

questions.question: What are key areas to assess in your digital wellness?

options.text: Sleep quality, attention/focus, emotional wellbeing, relationships, physical health, and values alignment
How many apps you have installed

questions.explanation: A comprehensive assessment covers: sleep (nighttime use, quality), attention (fragmentation, focus), emotions (stress, comparison), relationships (connection vs. distraction), physical health (posture, eye strain), and values alignment.

questions.question: What should you do with insights from your digital wellness assessment?

options.text: Feel bad about your habits and do nothing
Identify 1-3 high-impact changes to experiment with, set specific goals, and track whether they improve your wellbeing
Compare your results to others and compete

questions.explanation: Use assessment insights to prioritize: choose 1-3 changes with the highest potential impact, set specific, measurable goals, experiment, and track results. Small, strategic changes beat overwhelming overhauls.

questions.question: Complete a quick self-assessment: Rate your satisfaction (1-10) with how technology affects your sleep, focus, relationships, and emotional wellbeing. Which area needs the most improvement? What's one specific change you could test this week?
